name: Single Question Test
description: Minimal non-delegating template for OutputSpec passthrough verification. One question, direct answer.

question.description: A simple question to answer directly

assertions.assertion: Answer this question directly in 1-2 sentences: {{question}}
assertions.commentary: CRITICAL: Answer directly. Do NOT use dispatch_job or any delegation.

assertions.assertion: Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly this structure: { "answer": "your answer here", "confidence": "high|medium|low" }

do: Return valid JSON with answer and confidence fields

assertions.commentary: OutputSpec extraction requires this exact structure at the root level.
